g.text: Hard Link: Multiple Names, Single Identity
Symbolic Link: Pointer to a Path

ul.li: Hard Link: Direct inode reference. Deleting one name does not delete the data if i_links > 0.
Symlink: Indirect lookup. Inode i_data stores the target path. If the target file is moved/deleted, the symlink breaks (Dangling Link).
Performance: Hard links provide O(1) metadata access. Symlinks require O(N) path resolution cycles through the VFS directory tree.
